function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0009
alias: helios_discovery_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-20
total_eur: 600
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 420
    line_eur: 420
  - item: follow-up findings memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Helios discovery and workflow mapping invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0009                       |
| alias          | helios_discovery_invoice       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-20                     |
| total_eur      | 600                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 1   | 420      | 420      |
| 2 | follow-up findings memo           | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 600      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older consulting invoice that Miles would scan when the Helios lane becomes formal enough to track properly.

I added invoice YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md` using visible data from the note, preserved the original body text below the frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.

function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice note. The target file contained all required invoice fields and line items; these were added to YAML frontmatter per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, with the original note body retained verbatim below frontmatter, satisfying `99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md` and inbox processing workflow.
